name: HEPATIC VEINS
definition: dampened oscillations of hepatic veins resembling portal vein flow ← "shielding" of "portalization" of hepatic vein flow pattern D wave greater than S wave
dominant_finding: drop of a wave of hepatic venous waveform below baseline
distribution: drop of a wave of hepatic venous waveform below baseline
discriminating_features: drop of a wave of hepatic venous waveform below baseline

general: drop of a wave of hepatic venous waveform below baseline
